_comment: Module repo SHAs pinned for the OpenNext build pipeline. Per spec-portal-on-cloudflare-workers §4.5 / §7.2: the Worker bundle is built at deploy time, not pod startup. The CI workflow (.github/workflows/portal-deploy.yml) clones each repo at the SHA below and feeds them to next build via the @gatewaze-modules/* webpack alias. Bumping a SHA here is the explicit, reviewable signal that a module's contribution to the portal is changing in the next deploy.
